query: SELECT f.id, f.studentId, f.mentorId, f.rating, f.comment, u.name as student_name, m.name as mentor_name FROM feedbacks f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.studentId = u.id LEFT JOIN users m ON f.mentorId = m.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3GB82FZGmc2ADuw.a7b90b108d57 --database jiPvNqaHRUg9H2uZgXUx3J --execute SELECT f.id, f.studentId, f.mentorId, f.rating, f.comment, u.name as student_name, m.name as mentor_name FROM feedbacks f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.studentId = u.id LEFT JOIN users m ON f.mentorId = m.id LIMIT 10;

rows.comment: Mentorun geri bildirimleri çok faydalıydı. Kariyer hedeflerimi netleştirmeme yardımcı oldu.
